caption: A man with receding hair, wearing a dark navy blazer over a dark button-down shirt, stands against a plain, light-grey background. He is speaking and gesturing with his hands, which move from being open and extended in the first frame to a more closed, explanatory position by the final frame. A slim microphone on a stand is positioned in front of him, and a clear plastic water bottle sits on a surface just behind his waist. In the upper left and right corners of the scene, the logo "mediasite by concordia" is visible. The man remains in the same position throughout the sequence, while his facial expression and hand gestures shift as he continues his presentation, transitioning from outward gestures to bringing his hands closer together toward the end of the clip.
